phases.title: Primaries and Caucuses
phases.description: States hold primaries and caucuses to select delegates for the national conventions.
phases.timeline: January to June of election year

phases.title: National Conventions
phases.description: Parties hold conventions to officially nominate their candidate for President and Vice President.

phases.title: General Election
phases.description: Citizens vote for President. These votes actually select electors who pledge to vote for a specific candidate.

phases.title: Electoral College Vote
phases.description: Electors cast their official votes for President and Vice President.

phases.title: Inauguration
phases.description: The newly elected President takes the oath of office.
